data.title: U.S. Short-Term Interest Rate Futures Rise Amid Fed Rate Cut Speculation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. short-term interest rate futures experienced an increase as traders intensified their bets on a potential rate cut by the Federal Reserve. This development reflects growing market anticipation of a shift in monetary policy.

data.title: After listing on MGBX, ZORA’s price rose above 0.119 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of over 105%.
data.description: MGBX spot market data shows that ZORA has risen above 0.119 USDT and is currently trading at 0.118 USDT, a 24-hour increase of over 105% and a cumulative increase of over 190%, with a circulating market capitalization exceeding US$520 million. Zora is an NFT marketplace and creator platform that supports custom minting contracts and focuses on the Web 3 creator economy.

data.title: NASDAQ’s First Tether Gold Treasury: Prestige Wealth Raises $150M and Rebrands as Aurelion
data.description:
Asset management firm Prestige Wealth Inc. announced Friday that it has secured about $150 million in funding to create NASDAQ’s first Tether Gold Treasury, as part of a broader plan to incorporate tokenized gold into its reserve assets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/nasdaqs-first-tether-gold-fund-prestige-wealth-raises-150m-and-rebrands-as-aurelion-inc/

data.title: Dollar Index Declines as Non-U.S. Currencies Rise
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a significant drop, falling over 15 points to 99.09. In contrast, non-U.S. currencies saw gains, with the euro rising nearly 20 points against the dollar to 1.1600, the British pound climbing almost 40 points to 1.3335, and the dollar dropping approximately 40 points against the Japanese yen to 152.06. European stocks also saw a rapid decline, with Germany's DAX, France's CAC40, and Italy's FTSE MIB indices all falling by more than 1%.

Previously, U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to "substantially increase" tariffs on China.

data.title: CZ retweeted a photo with Vitalik 11 years ago: He had co-hosted several "Easy Residence" events with Vitalik
data.description: CZ retweeted a photo of himself and Vitalik from 11 years ago on the X platform. He said, "In 2015, before the rise of ETH, Vitalik hosted several 'Easy Residence' events at my house. At that time, I really should have invested 5% of the funds in the 'Easy Residence' events, just like the current investment model. But then again, if I had done that, there might not be BNB. (The photo was taken in a Chicago hotel room in July 2014.)" CZ also revealed that he meets with Vitalik several times a year and donated $10 million worth of BNB to Vitalik's biotech project a few months ago.

data.title: Norwegian Officials Investigate Nobel Peace Prize Information Leak
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Norwegian authorities are investigating a potential information leak regarding the Nobel Peace Prize results. This inquiry was prompted by unusual betting activity on the Polymarket platform. 

Data from Polymarket indicates that the probability of Venezuelan opposition leader Maria Corina Machado winning the prize surged significantly before the official announcement. Reports suggest that three accounts on Polymarket primarily bet on Machado, collectively earning approximately $90,000.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches AOP, STBL, and BLESS Trading Competitions with a Total Prize Pool of $2 Million
data.description: Binance Wallet has officially launched the BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition on Binance Alpha. During the competition, participants can trade AOP, STBL, and BLESS on Binance Wallet (without private keys) or through Binance Alpha to win a share of a prize pool worth $2 million. The competition runs from 12:00 AM on October 11, 2025, to 12:00 AM on October 25, 2025 (GMT+8).

data.title: Aster: The Stage 2 airdrop threshold is 10,000 RH points. Beware of scam accounts and messages.
data.description: Aster announced on the X platform that the minimum points required for the Stage 2 airdrop is 10,000 RH points. Users who reach or exceed this minimum during Stage 2 are eligible to receive the airdrop. The airdrop amount is calculated based on several factors from the Stage 2 campaign, including trading volume, holding period, Aster assets (such as BNB and USDF), realized profit and loss (P&L), and referral or team contributions across different epochs. All eligible users' points will be converted proportionally into the final airdrop allocation. Aster warns against scam X accounts and messages. For your own safety, please ensure that any links you click are from official accounts.
